title: Borsch instead of lava
description: Famous Ukrainian borsch instead of lava,flowing lava and lava bucket!
body:
i've spend 5 years carrying this idea in my mind, and now its the time.
lavacreep is presenting his precious texture pack - borsch lava!!!
i have changed the lava bucket texture, the lava texture and the fllowing lava texture.
enjoy the delicious Ukrainian borsch ingame!

**IGNORE THE INCOMPATIBILITY POPUP**
